title: Reference data for MITOS2
author: Matthias Bernt
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description:
Reference data for MITOS2 derived from RefSeq63 and 81 separately for Metazoa (m), Fungi (f), and Opisthokonta (o). 

 Contains 

 - fasta databases for the BLAST searches 

 - automatically derived covariance models for RNA searches 

 - for refseq63m hidden markov models for protein prediction (http://dx.doi.org/10.1016/j.ympev.2016.09.024)
steps_raw:
Reference data for MITOS2 derived from RefSeq63 and 81 separately for Metazoa (m), Fungi (f), and Opisthokonta (o).
